input.code:
# Load required libraries
library(DESeq2)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)

# Read counts and metadata
counts_df <- read.csv('counts_de.csv', row.names = 1)
metadata <- read.csv('metadata_de.csv', row.names = 1)

# Convert to integer matrix (DESeq2 requires integers)
counts_matrix <- as.matrix(counts_df)
counts_matrix <- apply(counts_matrix, 2, as.integer)
rownames(counts_matrix) <- rownames(counts_df)

print(paste("Counts matrix:", nrow(counts_matrix), "genes ×", ncol(counts_matrix), "cells"))
print(table(metadata$cell_type))

# Create DESeqDataSet
dds <- DESeqDataSetFromMatrix(countData = counts_matrix,
                               colData = metadata,
                               design = ~ cell_type)

print("DESeqDataSet created")
print(dds)
